parameters.name: preblacklevel
parameters.label: Pre-Black Level
parameters.description: Similar to the Black Level parameter of a Luma Level . Pixels with a luminosity less than this value are pushed to black.

parameters.name: pregamma
parameters.label: Pre-Gamma
parameters.description: Similar to the Gamma parameter of a Luma Level , applies a gamma adjustment to the pixel value after the Pre-Black Level stage, which makes all non-zero values closer to RGB = 1, 1, 1.

parameters.name: prebrightness
parameters.label: Pre-Brightness
parameters.description: Similar to the Brightness parameter of a Luma Level , it is a multiplier for the pixel value after the Pre-Gamma stage.

parameters.name: minbloomradius
parameters.label: Min Bloom Radius
parameters.description: Determines the minimum blur level to start sampling from. It is 0 to 1, so given a 1024x1024 image has 10 blur levels, if Minimum Bloom Size is set to .2, we will begin sampling from blur level 2 (the

parameters.name: maxbloomradius
parameters.label: Max Bloom Radius
parameters.description: Determines the maximum blur level we sample from. It is 0 to 1, so if the image has 10 blur levels and a Maximum Bloom Size is set to .8, we will sample mipmap levels up to level 8. If Max<Min, Max is

parameters.name: bloomthreshold
parameters.label: Bloom Threshold
parameters.description: After the blur levels have been mixed, this cuts away the darkest part of the image, or, when < 0, it adds more of the full-image average.

parameters.name: bloomscurve
parameters.label: Bloom S-Curve
parameters.description: Reshapes the bloom rolloff so that it is tighter/steeper to the hot spots.

parameters.name: bloomintensity
parameters.label: Bloom Intensity
parameters.description: Final multiplier of accumulated bloom value.

parameters.name: output
parameters.label: Output
parameters.description: Permits the user to select the image that is output; useful for previewing the outputs of each stage of the bloom pipeline. If set to "Input", the original image is output; if set to "Preprocess", the

examples.label: Configure Bloom Intensity and Bloom Threshold
examples.description: Common settings from 34 real Derivative examples
